project.name: vibe-pm
project.description: OpenCode plugin for step-aware context injection. Trims messages per flow step, injects minimal but relevant context, collects per-step metrics.

nodes.label: FlowEngine
nodes.summary: Core business class implementing FSM step flow, three-layer sandwich context injection, message pruning pipeline, and LLM-driven step transitions. Located at src/engine/flow-engine.ts.
nodes.languageNotes: Implements IFlowEngine interface: onMessage, injectContext, transformMessages, onSessionIdle, parseFlow, readFlowContent, listFlows, startTask, setStep.
nodes.name: FlowEngine

nodes.label: Three-Layer Sandwich Injection
nodes.summary: Context injection strategy splitting injected content into three layers: Layer 1 (global overview ~900T, cache-stable) with Constitution, FSM diagram, step summaries; Layer 2 (current step detail ~900T) with instructions, regulations, task state; Layer 3 (lookahead window 0-600T) with next 1-2 consecutive non-HiL steps. Saves 40-60% tokens vs full flow injection. Uses MD5 fingerprint deduplication to skip re-injection within same step. Designed to preserve LLM prompt cache stability.
nodes.name: SandwichInjection

nodes.label: Message Pruning Pipeline
nodes.summary: Three-step message pruning algorithm: (1) tagMessagesByStep — assigns step IDs to messages based on step transition timeline, (2) assignDepthLevel — allocates depth 0 (current, preserved), depth 1 (previous, key decisions), depth 2 (two steps back, user content only), depth 3 (older, placeholder), with HiL steps adding +1 depth to prior messages, (3) pruneByDepth — executes top-down until token budget met. Lazy: only triggers when tokens > 80% of maxStepTokens. Protection: user messages max depth 2, current step tool results never pruned, injected context never pruned, minimum 3 recent messages always kept.
nodes.name: MessagePruning

nodes.label: MemorySystem
nodes.summary: Data persistence class wrapping AxioDB embedded database (JSON file storage). Manages Task, Discussion, FlowMetrics CRUD operations. Located at src/memory/memory-system.ts.
nodes.name: MemorySystem

nodes.label: Task
nodes.summary: Core data model representing an active task: sessionId (PK), flow name, currentStep (S1-Sn), currentStepName, startAt (ISO 8601), closed boolean, summary, optional specRef and planRef. Managed by Memory System. Lifecycle: Created → Running → Completed.
nodes.name: Task

nodes.label: Discussion
nodes.summary: Auto-generated improvement suggestion from post-task analysis: UUID id, fromSessionId (FK→Task), priority (high/medium/low), importance and severity (1-5), issue/reason/solution descriptions, optional decision field (user-filled on async review), taskSummary (copied from Task), createdAt/resolvedAt timestamps.
nodes.name: Discussion

nodes.label: FlowMetrics
nodes.summary: Per-step runtime metrics: sessionId (FK), flow, step, stepName, stepInCount (entries), tokensConsumed, dwellTime (ms), humanInterventionTime (ms), userInputTokens, taskSummary. Collected on step enter/exit by Metrics & Analysis module. Aggregated per flow for trend analysis.
nodes.name: FlowMetrics

nodes.label: PluginCore
nodes.summary: Plugin entry point (VibePMPlugin function in src/core/plugin.ts). Orchestrates all modules: loads config, initializes Memory System and Flow Engine, registers 8 /pm-* commands via dual config+tool hooks, binds lifecycle hooks (chat.message, system.transform, messages.transform, session.idle). Module integration via direct imports — no DI container.
nodes.name: PluginCore

nodes.label: TemplateManager
nodes.summary: Template management functions (scanTemplates, installTemplate, uninstallFlow in src/template/template-manager.ts). Pure file operations by path convention — no abstraction layer. Scans /docs/template/, copies to /docs/flow/, auto-generates .opencode/commands/{command}.md prompt files from Command metadata field.
nodes.name: TemplateManager

nodes.label: FSM (Finite State Machine)
nodes.summary: Step transition model defined via Mermaid stateDiagram in flow documents. Transitions are NOT hardcoded — the Flow Engine injects the FSM diagram and instructions into the system prompt and lets the LLM autonomously decide when to advance steps. HiL (human-in-loop) steps require user confirmation before advancing; non-HiL steps auto-advance on completion. Back-edges enable iterative refinement.
nodes.name: FSM

nodes.label: Human-in-loop (HiL)
nodes.summary: Design pattern for steps requiring user intervention. Marked by ⚠️ emoji in step title + blockquote warning in flow docs. At these steps, the LLM must use blocking question/confirm tools, asking only 1 question at a time, and wait for user response before continuing. HiL steps serve as natural breakpoints for message pruning (prior steps get +1 depth level) and cache optimization (injection skipped during user interaction). Common HiL steps: plan review, spec confirmation, user acceptance.
nodes.name: HumanInLoop

nodes.label: AxioDB
nodes.summary: Embedded database v9.6.6 used for structured memory (JSON file storage at .vibe-pm/data.json). Key constraints: no $set operator (UpdateOne accepts plain objects), queries return { statusCode, data: { documents } } wrapper, single process instance limit. Stores three collections: tasks, discussions, flowMetrics.
nodes.name: AxioDB

nodes.label: TUI Display
nodes.summary: Terminal status display showing active tasks with flow name, current step, elapsed time, per-step dwell-time bar chart (with HiL markers and current-step highlight), and total token consumption. Read-only consumer of Memory System. Currently Draft — rendering approach TBD (Option A: OpenCode sidebar injection; Option B: independent ANSI process).
nodes.name: TUIDisplay

nodes.label: Metrics & Analysis
nodes.summary: Per-step metrics collection and post-task analysis module. Collects StepTokenBreakdown across 7 buckets, uses StickyTokenCache (5-min TTL) for debouncing, identifies bottlenecks via dwellTime>30%, stepInCount>3, or humanIntervention>50% thresholds, and auto-generates prioritized Discussion items. Deterministic rule-based analysis (non-LLM). Currently Draft.
nodes.name: MetricsAnalysis

nodes.label: Constitution
nodes.summary: Top-level governance with 8 non-negotiable principles: Flow+Spec+Test-Driven, Type Safety Supreme, Verification Mandatory, Mermaid Diagrams Only, Module Independence, Minimal Change, SDK-First Development, Chinese-First Communication. Always injected into system prompt (Layer 1). Zero-tolerance table defines enforcement for violations (type escape, skipping S4, deleting failing tests, mixing refactor into bugfix). Takes precedence over all other regulations.
nodes.name: Constitution

nodes.label: Coding Style
nodes.summary: TypeScript coding standard: UTF-8/LF, 2-space indent, Prettier formatting, kebab-case files, camelCase variables, PascalCase types/classes, UPPER_SNAKE_CASE constants. Strict type safety rules (no any/@ts-ignore/empty catch), function design guidelines (object params over 3 args, Result<T,E> pattern), async/await convention, structured logging, and TODO/FIXME/HACK placeholder format.
nodes.name: CodingStyle
Feature Spec Template
nodes.summary: Feature Spec template document defining the standard structure for feature specification documents, including sections for requirements, user stories, design points, boundaries, test cases, constraints, and development progress.

nodes.name: Engine Errors
nodes.summary: Flow Engine错误类定义：DuplicateActiveTaskError（重复活跃任务）、FlowNotFoundError（流程文档缺失）、FlowParseError（文档解析失败）。

nodes.name: Main Entry
nodes.summary: vibe-pm插件主入口，re-export VibePMPlugin供OpenCode加载。

nodes.name: Memory Errors
nodes.summary: Memory System错误类定义：DuplicateTaskError（重复任务创建）和MemorySystemError（通用数据层错误）。

nodes.name: types.ts
nodes.summary: Template Manager type definitions. Single interface TemplateMeta with id, name, category, description, version, command (slash command), flowPath, bundleDir.

nodes.name: DuplicateActiveTaskError
nodes.summary: Thrown when attempting to start a new task while an active task already exists in the current session. Provides details about the existing task.

nodes.name: FlowNotFoundError
nodes.summary: Thrown when a requested Flow document is not found in /docs/flow/.

nodes.name: FlowParseError
nodes.summary: Thrown when a Flow document fails to parse correctly.

nodes.name: DuplicateTaskError
nodes.summary: Thrown when attempting to create a second Task for a session that already has an active task. Data-layer level enforcement of one-active-task-per-session constraint.

nodes.name: MemorySystemError
nodes.summary: Generic data-layer error for the MemorySystem.

nodes.title: Vitest Configuration
nodes.summary: Vitest test runner configuration with a single test include pattern matching tests/**/*.test.ts, using the default Vitest config export pattern.
nodes.content: Exports a default defineConfig with test.include set to ["tests/**/*.test.ts"]. Simple configuration — all test files live under tests/ and follow the *.test.ts naming convention.
nodes.name: Vitest Configuration
.gitignore
nodes.summary: Git忽略规则文件，排除node_modules、dist、.vibe-pm等构建产物和运行时数据目录。

nodes.name: .understandignore
nodes.summary: understand-anything工具的忽略规则，排除.ui-model、node_modules、.git等分析无关目录。

nodes.name: config.json
nodes.summary: understand-anything工具的自动更新配置，控制知识图谱分析行为。

nodes.name: knowledge-graph.json
nodes.summary: 自动生成的项目知识图谱数据，包含节点、边、分层和导览信息。

nodes.name: meta.json
nodes.summary: 知识图谱分析元数据，记录分析时间、Git提交哈希和分析文件数。

nodes.name: test-flow.md
nodes.summary: 测试流程定义，包含S1-S4四个步骤（理解需求、设计方案、Human-in-loop审查、实现）及FSM状态机。

nodes.name: dictionary.md
nodes.summary: 术语字典，定义核心概念、任务模型、记忆体系、流程相关和技术栈术语的标准名称与含义。

nodes.name: vibe-pm-roadmap.md
nodes.summary: 交付路线图，规划4个阶段（MVP核心4周→模板1周→增强2周→收尾1周）及里程碑和风险缓解策略。

nodes.name: bug-fix/flow.md
nodes.summary: Bug修复流程模板，包含S1-S9九个步骤（理解Bug→根因分析→审查方案→编写修复→编写测试→回归验证→自查→用户验收→合流）。

nodes.name: coding-style-template.md
nodes.summary: 编码风格模板（语言无关），提供可复用的编码规范骨架，含文件组织、命名、类型安全、函数设计等25个章节的占位模板。

nodes.name: constitution-template.md
nodes.summary: 项目宪章模板，提供6条通用核心原则模板（流程驱动开发、类型安全、验证强制性、Mermaid图表优先、最小变更、中文优先沟通）。

nodes.name: Dictionary Template
nodes.summary: 术语字典模板，定义项目核心概念、任务模型、流程相关和通用术语的中英文对照表。作为本地化语言↔英文术语转换的参考文档。

nodes.name: Migration Checklist
nodes.summary: 大规模重构兼容性验证清单，涵盖接口兼容性、数据兼容性、测试覆盖和迁移路径四大验证维度，用于S10兼容性验证步骤。

nodes.name: Feature Spec Template
nodes.summary: Feature Spec文档模板，定义功能规格说明的标准结构：需求背景、用户故事（P1/P2/P3优先级）、设计要点（领域模型/接口/配置）、边界与错误、测试用例和开发进度。

nodes.name: pnpm-lock.yaml
nodes.summary: pnpm依赖锁定文件，记录完整的依赖树和版本哈希，确保环境可重现。

nodes.name: Config
nodes.summary: 配置管理模块，从项目目录加载.vibe-pm.json，支持默认值合并覆盖和容错处理，启动时自动创建默认配置文件。

nodes.name: Core Index
nodes.summary: Plugin Core统一导出入口，re-export VibePMPlugin、配置函数、命令注册函数、logger和所有类型定义。

nodes.name: Engine Index
nodes.summary: Engine模块统一导出入口，re-export FlowEngine类、StartTaskParams类型和三个错误类。

nodes.name: loadConfig
nodes.summary: 从项目目录加载.vibe-pm.json，深度合并默认配置（含嵌套contextInjection），解析失败时回退到默认值。

nodes.name: writeConfig
nodes.summary: 将PluginConfig序列化为JSON写入.vibe-pm.json文件。

nodes.name: ensureDefaultConfig
nodes.summary: 检查.vibe-pm.json是否存在，若不存在则写入默认配置，返回是否创建。

nodes.name: DuplicateActiveTaskError
nodes.summary: 在已有活跃任务的session中启动新任务时的错误类，携带现有任务信息（flow/step/name/summary/time）。

nodes.name: FlowNotFoundError
nodes.summary: 请求的Flow文档在docs/flow/中不存在时的错误类。

nodes.name: FlowParseError
nodes.summary: Flow文档解析失败时的错误类，携带解析失败原因。

nodes.name: DuplicateTaskError
nodes.summary: 为已有活跃任务的session创建第二个Task时的错误类，携带sessionId。

nodes.name: MemorySystemError
nodes.summary: MemorySystem通用数据层错误类，携带自定义错误信息。

nodes.name: TemplateMeta
nodes.summary: Template metadata parsed from flow.md: unique id, display name, category, description, version, associated slash command, flow.md path, bundle root directory.

nodes.name: vitest.config.ts
nodes.summary: Vitest test runner configuration: includes tests/**/*.test.ts pattern.

nodes.name: commands.ts
nodes.summary: Registers all /pm-* commands via config hooks (declarative) and tool hooks (executable). Defines COMMANDS metadata list, registerCommands/registerFlowCommands for config injection, registerTools/registerFlowTools for SDK tool() registration. Implements executable tool factories: install/uninstall flow, config view/edit, task set-step/close/current-step, and generic flow-start tools that extract userRequest from session messages.
nodes.languageNotes: TypeScript, @opencode-ai/plugin SDK, async/await, JSON serialization

nodes.name: logger.ts
nodes.summary: Logging utility wrapping OpenCode SDK app.log(). Exposes initLogger to set client, setLogEnabled toggle, and a singleton logger object with debug/info/warn/error methods. Extracts caller filename from Error.stack for service attribution. Silently fails on write errors.
nodes.languageNotes: TypeScript, Error.stack parsing, async void fire-and-forget

nodes.name: plugin.ts
nodes.summary: Plugin entry point exporting VibePMPlugin. Initializes config, MemorySystem, FlowEngine, TokenCounter. Registers hooks: config (commands), tool (executable tools), experimental.chat.messages.transform (token counting, flow control injection, out-of-control detection, cleanup), event (session.created token initialization). Core orchestration layer.
nodes.languageNotes: TypeScript, @opencode-ai/plugin SDK hooks, async/await, error-tolerant initialization

nodes.name: types.ts
nodes.summary: Core type definitions. Re-exports Plugin, PluginInput, Hooks, Config, ToolContext, ToolDefinition, tool from @opencode-ai/plugin SDK. Defines PluginConfig (language, dataDir, autoAnalyze, contextInjection), IPluginContext (config, projectDir, dataDir, client), ILogger (debug/info/warn/error), ToolDefinitionWithKey.
nodes.languageNotes: TypeScript, type-only imports/exports, interface definitions

nodes.name: flow-engine.ts
nodes.summary: FlowEngine class managing FSM-driven task lifecycle. startTask validates flow existence, deduplicates userRequest, checks for active task collisions, delegates createTask to MemorySystem. setStep handles step transitions with dwell time calculation and persistence. closeTask computes final dwell time and closes. injectFlowControlPrompt/injectFlowWarningPrompt splice synthetic parts into message streams. buildControlPrompt generates <protect> rules. Parses flow Markdown via tryParseStepName and buildCommandFlowMap for command-to-flow resolution.
nodes.languageNotes: TypeScript, async/await, filesystem parsing, Map caching, regex Markdown parsing

nodes.name: dcp.ts
nodes.summary: Writes DCP (Data Control Protection) configuration. Scans project and global opencode config paths for plugin presence. Creates/merges dcp.jsonc with protectTags and protectedFilePatterns for docs/flow, docs/regulation, docs/spec.
nodes.languageNotes: TypeScript, node:fs, node:path, node:os, JSON merge logic

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Barrel file re-exporting writeDcpConfig from ./dcp.js.
nodes.languageNotes: TypeScript, barrel export

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Barrel file re-exporting MemorySystem, DuplicateTaskError, MemorySystemError, and type definitions (Task, CreateTaskInput, Discussion, CreateDiscussionInput, FlowMetrics, IMemorySystem, TokenSource, SourceTokenBreakdown, StepTokenBreakdown).
nodes.languageNotes: TypeScript, barrel export with type re-exports

nodes.name: memory-system.ts
nodes.summary: MemorySystem class implementing IMemorySystem. SQLite-based persistence layer using bun:sqlite. Manages 4 database tables (tasks, discussions, flowMetrics, session_tokens) with prepared statements. CRUD operations for all entities, step transition tracking, token recording with source breakdown, dwell time accumulation, session-level token aggregation with API telemetry scale factor. Includes DDL, migrations, and row mapping helpers.
nodes.languageNotes: TypeScript, bun:sqlite, prepared statements, WAL mode, JSON column storage, UUID generation

nodes.name: types.ts
nodes.summary: Memory entity type definitions. Defines StepTransition, Task (FSM state with step transitions), CreateTaskInput, Discussion (with priority/importance/severity), CreateDiscussionInput, TokenSource union type (6 categories), FlowMetrics (per-step metrics), SourceTokenBreakdown, StepTokenBreakdown, SessionTokenMetrics (session-level token storage), RecordSessionTokensInput, IMemorySystem interface (full API contract).
nodes.languageNotes: TypeScript, interface definitions, union types, import from src/token

nodes.name: registerCommands
nodes.summary: Registers declarative command configs by iterating COMMANDS array and setting opencodeConfig.command entries.

nodes.name: registerFlowCommands
nodes.summary: Scans docs/flow/ directory for Markdown files, matches **Command**: metadata, registers each as a command pointing to the corresponding pm_* tool.

nodes.name: registerTools
nodes.summary: Creates tool definitions for executable commands (install-flow, uninstall-flow, config, task-set-step, task-close, task-current-step) using SDK tool() factory.

nodes.name: registerFlowTools
nodes.summary: Scans docs/flow/ for installed flows and creates start-task tool definitions for each.

nodes.name: flowNameToToolKey
nodes.summary: Converts a flow name to tool key format (e.g. spec-driven-dev to pm_spec_driven_dev).

nodes.name: initLogger
nodes.summary: Sets the LogClient instance for log writes.

nodes.name: setLogEnabled
nodes.summary: Toggles logging on/off globally.

nodes.name: logger
nodes.summary: Singleton ILogger instance with debug/info/warn/error methods wrapping app.log writes.

nodes.name: VibePMPlugin
nodes.summary: Plugin entry function. Initializes config, MemorySystem, FlowEngine, TokenCounter. Returns Hooks object with config, tool, experimental.chat.messages.transform, and event handlers. Core integration point for all subsystems.

nodes.name: PluginConfig
nodes.summary: Plugin configuration: language (zh-CN/en-US), dataDir, autoAnalyze, contextInjection (maxStepTokens, pruneIrrelevant), optional debug flags.

nodes.name: IPluginContext
nodes.summary: Plugin runtime context providing readonly access to config, projectDir, dataDir, and OpencodeClient.

nodes.name: ILogger
nodes.summary: Logger interface with debug/info/warn/error variadic methods.

nodes.name: FlowEngine
nodes.summary: Manages FSM-driven task lifecycle: start, step transitions, close. Handles flow control prompt injection/sanitization into message streams. Parses flow Markdown documents for step names and command mappings. Uses MemorySystem for persistence.

nodes.name: StartTaskParams
nodes.summary: Parameters for starting a task: sessionId, flow, summary, userRequest.

nodes.name: writeDcpConfig
nodes.summary: Detects opencode plugin config in project/global files, creates/merges DCP config with protectTags and protectedFilePatterns for docs directories.

nodes.name: MemorySystem
nodes.summary: SQLite-based structured memory layer implementing IMemorySystem. Manages tasks, discussions, flowMetrics, and session_tokens tables with prepared statements. Handles CRUD, step transitions, token recording, dwell time, and session-level aggregation.

nodes.name: Task
nodes.summary: Task entity: id, sessionId, flow, currentStep/currentStepName, startAt/endAt, closed flag, summary, userRequest, stepTransitions array.

nodes.name: Discussion
nodes.summary: Discussion entity: id, fromSessionId, priority/importance/severity, issue/reason/solution, decision, taskSummary, timestamps.

nodes.name: FlowMetrics
nodes.summary: Per-step metrics: stepInCount, tokensConsumed, tokensBySource breakdown, dwellTime, humanInterventionTime, userInputTokens.

nodes.name: IMemorySystem
nodes.summary: Full API contract for the memory system: Task CRUD, Discussion CRUD, FlowMetrics recording, Session Tokens, init.

nodes.name: SessionTokenMetrics
nodes.summary: Session-level token storage with per-category breakdown (user, assistant, flowControl, text, tool, reasoning), API telemetry columns (apiInput, apiOutput, etc.), scaleFactor, and timestamps.

nodes.name: StepTransition
nodes.summary: Records a step transition: fromStep, toStep, at (ISO 8601 timestamp).

nodes.name: TokenSource
nodes.summary: Union type: System | FlowControl | User | Assistant | Tool | Reasoning.

nodes.name: src/template/index.ts
nodes.summary: Template module barrel export — re-exports scanTemplates, installTemplate, uninstallFlow, listInstalledFlows, TemplateConflictError, writeDcpConfig, and TemplateMeta type
nodes.languageNotes: TypeScript ES2022, NodeNext module resolution

nodes.name: src/template/template-manager.ts
nodes.summary: Core template management module — scans template bundles, installs flows with regulations/constitution/dictionary/coding-style, uninstalls flows, detects project languages, generates coding style guides from templates
nodes.languageNotes: TypeScript ES2022, NodeNext module resolution, pure file-system operations (node:fs, node:path), no external dependencies

nodes.name: src/token/index.ts
nodes.summary: Token module barrel export — re-exports TokenCounter class and TokenCount, MessagePack, ApiTelemetry types
nodes.languageNotes: TypeScript ES2022, NodeNext module resolution

nodes.name: src/token/token-counter.ts
nodes.summary: TokenCounter class — uses tiktoken to count tokens in messages, classifies by source (user/assistant, text/flowControl/tool/reasoning), computes per-message TokenCount structures
nodes.languageNotes: TypeScript ES2022, depends on tiktoken npm package and @opencode-ai/sdk types

nodes.name: src/token/types.ts
nodes.summary: Token module type definitions — TokenCount (6-source breakdown), MessagePack (message + parts), ApiTelemetry (LLM API IO + cache)
nodes.languageNotes: TypeScript ES2022, pure type definitions, depends on @opencode-ai/sdk types

nodes.name: src/tui/components/collapsible.tsx
nodes.summary: Collapsible SolidJS UI component — toggles visibility of children content with show/hide arrow indicator, supports default collapsed state and title color
nodes.languageNotes: TypeScript JSX (SolidJS), depends on @opentui/core and solid-js

nodes.name: src/tui/components/empty-state.tsx
nodes.summary: EmptyState SolidJS UI component — centered muted-text placeholder for when no vibe-pm task data is available
nodes.languageNotes: TypeScript JSX (SolidJS), depends on @opentui/core and solid-js

nodes.name: src/tui/data/task-status.ts
nodes.summary: Task status data loader — queries IMemorySystem for active task (active), last closed task (last), or returns empty state, computes formatted elapsed time
nodes.languageNotes: TypeScript ES2022, depends on IMemorySystem interface from memory module

nodes.name: src/tui/data/token-data.ts
nodes.summary: Token data loader — loads session token metrics and step breakdown from IMemorySystem, applies display formulas (scaleFactor) for TUI visualization
nodes.languageNotes: TypeScript ES2022, depends on IMemorySystem interface from memory module

nodes.name: src/tui/index.ts
nodes.summary: TUI module entry point — creates TuiPluginModule with createTuiPlugin(), exposes as default export for OpenCode TUI loader, re-exports types
nodes.languageNotes: TypeScript ES2022, depends on @opencode-ai/plugin/tui

nodes.name: src/tui/slots/sidebar-content.tsx
nodes.summary: Sidebar content slot component — renders task status (active/last/empty), token distribution bar chart with color-coded segments, token detail collapsible, step breakdown collapsible
nodes.languageNotes: TypeScript JSX (SolidJS), depends on @opentui/core and solid-js

nodes.name: src/tui/tui-plugin.tsx
nodes.summary: TUI plugin entry — createTuiPlugin() registers sidebar_content slot, creates IMemorySystem (shared or auto-init), polls task/token data every 1s, renders SidebarContent
nodes.languageNotes: TypeScript JSX (SolidJS), depends on solid-js lifecycle, IMemorySystem, MemorySystem

nodes.name: src/tui/types.ts
nodes.summary: TUI shared type definitions — TaskStatusData (active/last/empty union), TokenData with source/step breakdown, color mapping constants, and utility functions (formatElapsed, compactTokens, visualWidth, justify)
nodes.languageNotes: TypeScript ES2022, depends on RGBA from @opentui/core and TokenSource from memory module

nodes.name: scripts/build-tui.ts
nodes.summary: Build script using Bun.build() — compiles server plugin (pure TS) and TUI plugin (SolidJS JSX via @opentui/solid/bun-plugin) with shared externals configuration
nodes.languageNotes: TypeScript (Bun script), depends on @opentui/solid/bun-plugin

nodes.name: TemplateConflictError
nodes.summary: Error class thrown when installing a flow that already exists in /docs/flow/, with --force hint in the message
nodes.languageNotes: TypeScript, extends built-in Error class

nodes.name: scanTemplates
nodes.summary: Scans docs/template/ directory for template bundles containing flow.md, parses frontmatter metadata, returns array of TemplateMeta
nodes.languageNotes: TypeScript, synchronous file operations

nodes.name: installTemplate
nodes.summary: Installs a template by ID — copies flow.md to docs/flow/, copies regulations, installs constitution/dictionary/coding-style if missing, writes DCP config
nodes.languageNotes: TypeScript, synchronous file operations, coordinates multiple sub-installers

nodes.name: uninstallFlow
nodes.summary: Removes an installed flow by name — tries both flow-{name}.md and {name}.md naming conventions
nodes.languageNotes: TypeScript, synchronous file operations

nodes.name: listInstalledFlows
nodes.summary: Lists installed flows by scanning docs/flow/ for .md files and stripping naming prefixes
nodes.languageNotes: TypeScript, synchronous file operations

nodes.name: detectProjectLanguages
nodes.summary: Detects project languages by checking for indicator files (tsconfig.json, Cargo.toml, go.mod, etc.) and package dependencies, TypeScript overrides JavaScript
nodes.languageNotes: TypeScript, synchronous file operations, supports 10+ languages

nodes.name: generateCodingStyle
nodes.summary: Generates coding-style.md from template by substituting language-specific defaults (formatter, indent, naming conventions, async/error patterns) for the primary detected language
nodes.languageNotes: TypeScript, template string replacement with LANGUAGE_DEFAULTS data

nodes.name: parseTemplateMeta
nodes.summary: Parses flow.md frontmatter metadata using regex, extracting Template ID, Name, Category, Description, Version, and Command fields
nodes.languageNotes: TypeScript, regex-based markdown frontmatter parsing

nodes.name: TokenCounter
nodes.summary: Token counting engine — wraps tiktoken encoder, provides countTokens(text) and countContextTokens(message) with per-source classification (text/flowControl/tool/reasoning) and role attribution (user/assistant)
nodes.languageNotes: TypeScript, depends on tiktoken npm package, class-based design with dispose() for resource cleanup

nodes.name: TokenCount
nodes.summary: Token count breakdown by 6 sources: text, user, assistant, flowControl, tool, reasoning — used as the output format for TokenCounter.countContextTokens()
nodes.languageNotes: TypeScript interface, numeric fields for all 6 categories

nodes.name: MessagePack
nodes.summary: Message bundle combining @opencode-ai/sdk Message (info) and Part[] (parts) for token counting input
nodes.languageNotes: TypeScript interface, reuses @opencode-ai/sdk types

nodes.name: ApiTelemetry
nodes.summary: LLM API telemetry data — input/output/reasoning token counts and cache read/write, aligned with @opencode-ai/sdk tokens type
nodes.languageNotes: TypeScript interface, matches @opencode-ai/sdk token telemetry shape

nodes.name: Collapsible
nodes.summary: Collapsible SolidJS component — renders a titled header with expand/collapse arrow and conditionally shows slotted children content
nodes.languageNotes: TypeScript JSX (SolidJS), uses createSignal and Show from solid-js

nodes.name: EmptyState
nodes.summary: EmptyState SolidJS component — renders a centered muted text message when no task data is available
nodes.languageNotes: TypeScript JSX (SolidJS)

nodes.name: loadTaskStatus
nodes.summary: Loads task status from IMemorySystem — queries active task first, falls back to last closed task, returns empty state if none found
nodes.languageNotes: TypeScript ES2022, async function returning TaskStatusData union type

nodes.name: loadTokenData
nodes.summary: Loads token distribution data from IMemorySystem — parallel fetch of session metrics and step breakdown, applies display scale formulas
nodes.languageNotes: TypeScript ES2022, async function, uses Promise.all for parallel queries

nodes.name: createTuiPlugin
nodes.summary: Creates a TuiPlugin that registers the sidebar_content slot — initializes or reuses IMemorySystem, sets up 1s polling for task status and token data, renders SidebarContent
nodes.languageNotes: TypeScript JSX (SolidJS), uses createSignal/onCleanup lifecycle

nodes.name: SidebarContent
nodes.summary: Sidebar content SolidJS component — displays active/last task status with elapsed time, color-coded token distribution bar chart, token detail breakdown, and step-level token consumption
nodes.languageNotes: TypeScript JSX (SolidJS), uses SOURCE_COLORS from types, Collapsible and EmptyState sub-components

nodes.name: TaskStatusData
nodes.summary: Union interface for task status display — discriminated by type: active (flow/step/elapsed), last (same + endAt), or empty
nodes.languageNotes: TypeScript discriminated union with 'type' discriminant field

nodes.name: TokenData
nodes.summary: Token visualization data — totalTokens, sourceBreakdown[], stepBreakdown[], cached/uncached token counts for TUI rendering
nodes.languageNotes: TypeScript interface, aggregates source and step token entries

nodes.name: formatElapsed
nodes.summary: Formats time duration from startAt (and optional endAt) into human-readable string like '22min' or '1h 15min'
nodes.languageNotes: TypeScript utility function

nodes.name: compactTokens
nodes.summary: Formats token count into compact notation — '12.5K' for thousands, '16.4M' for millions
nodes.languageNotes: TypeScript utility function

nodes.name: visualWidth
nodes.summary: Calculates visual display width of a string where CJK characters count as 2 columns, ASCII as 1 column
nodes.languageNotes: TypeScript utility function with CJK Unicode range regex

nodes.name: justify
nodes.summary: CJK-aware two-end justification — pads spaces between left and right text to reach target visual width
nodes.languageNotes: TypeScript utility function, depends on visualWidth

nodes.name: SOURCE_COLORS
nodes.summary: Fixed color mapping for token sources — FlowControl (cyan), Text (blue), Tool (purple), Reasoning (periwinkle) using RGBA values
nodes.languageNotes: TypeScript Record<string, RGBA> constant, uses @opentui/core RGBA

nodes.name: build-tui.ts
nodes.summary: Bun build script — compiles server plugin (src/index.ts → dist/index.js) and TUI plugin (src/tui/index.ts → dist/tui/index.js with SolidJS plugin)
nodes.languageNotes: TypeScript (Bun top-level await), uses @opentui/solid/bun-plugin for JSX transformation

nodes.name: commands.test.ts
nodes.summary: Tests for command registration and tool execution: validates registerCommands registers 7 /pm-* commands, registerTools exposes 6 executable tools, and tools like pm_task_set_step, pm_task_close, pm_task_current_step handle active/inactive task states correctly using mock engine and temp MemorySystem
nodes.languageNotes: TypeScript, bun:test, 231 lines, uses mock() and spyOn

nodes.name: config.test.ts
nodes.summary: Tests for configuration management: validates loadConfig returns DEFAULT_CONFIG when file missing, partial override merges correctly, invalid JSON falls back with warning, deep merge for contextInjection, ensureDefaultConfig creates file when missing and skips when exists
nodes.languageNotes: TypeScript, bun:test, 121 lines, uses spyOn for logger verification

nodes.name: logger.test.ts
nodes.summary: Tests for logger utility: validates uninitialized logger does not throw, setLogEnabled(false) suppresses calls, re-enabling restores calls, info/debug/warn/error levels pass correct parameters, Error objects convert to extra, non-object data becomes detail, non-string messages convert
nodes.languageNotes: TypeScript, bun:test, 145 lines, async verification using setTimeout

nodes.name: plugin.test.ts
nodes.summary: Tests for VibePMPlugin: validates hooks registered (config, tool, messages.transform, event), protect injection when active task exists, skips when no auto-slash-command, clears stale control prompt, dedup tests for repeated injection
nodes.languageNotes: TypeScript, bun:test, 133 lines, uses temp dir with docs/flow structure

nodes.name: task-start.test.ts
nodes.summary: Tests for FlowEngine task lifecycle: validates startTask creates tasks with correct fields, rejects duplicate sessions, rejects missing flows with FlowNotFoundError, resolveFlowFromCommand matches commands to flow names, setStep records stepTransitions with dwellTime calculation, closeTask records final dwell time, reinstantiation preserves state across FlowEngine instances
nodes.languageNotes: TypeScript, bun:test, 184 lines, copies real test-flow.md and constitution.md

nodes.name: data-file.test.ts
nodes.summary: Tests for SQLite data file initialization: validates init creates vibe-pm.db on first run and allows CRUD operations after initialization
nodes.languageNotes: TypeScript, bun:test, 43 lines, temp dir per test suite

nodes.name: session-tokens.test.ts
nodes.summary: Tests for session token tracking: validates initSessionTokens creates row with zero counters and is idempotent, recordSessionTokens accumulates columns correctly, auto-inits if missing, accumulates across calls, updates updatedAt; API telemetry accumulates apiInput/apiOutput/apiReasoning/apiCacheRead/apiCacheWrite; scaleFactor calculation with zero denominator edge case; getSessionTokens returns null for nonexistent and correct values after write
nodes.languageNotes: TypeScript, bun:test, 312 lines, per-describe tmp dir cleanup

nodes.name: task-crud.test.ts
nodes.summary: Tests for task CRUD operations: validates createTask returns full fields, getActiveTask filters closed tasks, updateStep syncs step number and name, duplicate tasks rejected with DuplicateTaskError, listActiveTasks returns all open tasks, closeTask writes endAt, recordStepTokens accumulates tokensBySource across multiple calls, appendStepTransition stores ordered transitions
nodes.languageNotes: TypeScript, bun:test, 158 lines, shared MemorySystem per suite

nodes.name: task-query.test.ts
nodes.summary: Tests for MemorySystem query extensions: validates getLastClosedTask returns most recently closed by endAt, null when none closed or only active tasks; closeTask writes endAt timestamp; recordStepTokens creates and accumulates tokensBySource; getSourceTokenBreakdown aggregates across steps with legacy data handling; getStepTokenBreakdown returns per-step summary
nodes.languageNotes: TypeScript, bun:test, 220 lines, shared MemorySystem per suite

nodes.name: setup.ts
nodes.summary: Test setup file that mocks @opentui/core RGBA color utilities and @opentui/solid UI primitives (useKeyboard, render, extend) to enable TUI component tests without native module dependencies
nodes.languageNotes: TypeScript, bun:test, 30 lines, global mock.module() calls

nodes.name: command-generation.test.ts
nodes.summary: Tests for command file generation during template install/uninstall: validates TemplateMeta includes command field, missing Command results in empty string, installTemplate no longer generates .opencode/commands files, uninstallFlow does not touch command files, DCP config path resolution uses dcp.jsonc as preferred target
nodes.languageNotes: TypeScript, bun:test, 180 lines, temp dir per test with docs/template structure

nodes.name: template-scan.test.ts
nodes.summary: Tests for Template Manager: validates scanTemplates finds all templates, parses metadata (id, name, category, version), skips directories without flow.md; installTemplate copies flow and regulation files, throws TemplateConflictError on overwrite; uninstallFlow removes target only; listInstalledFlows returns installed names; DCP config prefers dcp.jsonc, falls back to dcp.json, creates dcp.jsonc if neither exists
nodes.languageNotes: TypeScript, bun:test, 227 lines, nested DCP describe with separate tmp dir

nodes.name: token-counter.test.ts
nodes.summary: Tests for TokenCounter: validates countTokens returns correct counts for normal/empty/whitespace strings; countContextTokens classifies text/flowControl/tool/reasoning parts by type, aggregates by user/assistant role, handles mixed parts, tool state.output/error/args fallbacks, unknown part types ignored; dispose calls encoder.free and is idempotent
nodes.languageNotes: TypeScript, bun:test, 312 lines, mocks tiktoken module globally

nodes.name: token-integration.test.ts
nodes.summary: Tests for token counting integration: validates messages.transform integration records prompt tokens with correct bySource breakdown (User, FlowControl) for active tasks; chat.message integration records completion tokens for assistant + tool parts; no active task results in no metrics written
nodes.languageNotes: TypeScript, bun:test, 189 lines, uses mock tiktoken + real MemorySystem

nodes.name: collapsible.test.ts
nodes.summary: Tests for TUI data layer and utilities: validates loadTaskStatus returns active/last/empty states with elapsed time; loadTokenData applies display formulas with scaleFactor, handles null metrics and API data; compactTokens formats in K; formatElapsed formats minutes/hours; visualWidth counts ASCII (1) and CJK (2) characters, handles mixed, block chars, empty; StepTokens padding integrity maintains minimum 1-space gap and overflow fallback
nodes.languageNotes: TypeScript, bun:test, 297 lines, async dynamic imports for test isolation

nodes.name: tui-plugin.test.ts
nodes.summary: Tests for TUI plugin factory: validates createTuiPlugin returns function with correct signature, does not throw in non-TUI environment (slots.register throws), accepts external memory system; SOURCE_COLORS has all 4 token sources (FlowControl, Text, Tool, Reasoning)
nodes.languageNotes: TypeScript, bun:test, 79 lines, dynamic imports for non-TUI env simulation

nodes.name: formatElapsed
nodes.summary: Tests for formatElapsed utility: validates minutes formatting (e.g. '5min'), hours+minutes formatting (e.g. '2h 10min'), and endAt parameter for completed intervals
nodes.languageNotes: Tests imported from src/tui/types.js

nodes.name: loadTaskStatus
nodes.summary: Tests for loadTaskStatus data loader: validates 'empty' type when no tasks, 'active' type with flow/step/elapsed when active task exists, 'last' type with flow/elapsed when only closed task exists
nodes.languageNotes: Tests imported from src/tui/data/task-status.js

nodes.name: loadTokenData
nodes.summary: Tests for loadTokenData data loader: validates display formulas with scaleFactor=1.0 produce correct source breakdown, null session metrics return zeros, API data with scaleFactor=2.0 scales correctly
nodes.languageNotes: Tests imported from src/tui/data/token-data.js

nodes.name: compactTokens
nodes.summary: Tests for compactTokens formatting utility: validates 12500→'12.5K', 1000→'1.0K', 999→'999', 0→'0'
nodes.languageNotes: Tests imported from src/tui/types.js

nodes.name: visualWidth
nodes.summary: Tests for visualWidth utility: validates ASCII=1 per char, CJK=2 per char, CJK punctuation=2, mixed ASCII/CJK, empty string=0, block characters='█'=1
nodes.languageNotes: Tests imported from src/tui/types.js

nodes.name: StepTokens padding integrity
nodes.summary: Tests for visual step token bar padding: validates each row has at least 1 space gap between label and value, falls back to 1 space when content overflows 38 columns
nodes.languageNotes: Uses visualWidth from src/tui/types.js for calculations

nodes.name: createMockEngine
nodes.summary: Helper function that creates a mock FlowEngine with mocked startTask, getCurrentStep, setStep, and closeTask methods returning predefined test data
nodes.languageNotes: Returns plain object cast as any

nodes.name: createTempMemory
nodes.summary: Helper function that creates a temporary directory and initializes a new MemorySystem with SQLite
nodes.languageNotes: Uses fs.mkdtempSync and MemorySystem.init

nodes.name: seedTask
nodes.summary: Helper function that creates a test task in MemorySystem with predefined research flow data
nodes.languageNotes: Calls memory.createTask with hardcoded flow='research'

nodes.name: mockInput
nodes.summary: Helper function creating a mock PluginInput object with test directory, client session, and workspace registration
nodes.languageNotes: Returns PluginInput-compatible object

nodes.name: makeTransformOutput
nodes.summary: Helper function wrapping message arrays into the experimental.chat.messages.transform output format with info and parts for each message
nodes.languageNotes: Returns transform output with sequential msg IDs

nodes.name: createTestProject
nodes.summary: Helper function creating a temp project with docs/flow, docs/regulation directories, copying test-flow.md and constitution.md from the real workspace
nodes.languageNotes: Copies real project files for realistic testing

nodes.name: setupMemory
nodes.summary: Helper function creating a MemorySystem initialized to a temp directory with a given prefix
nodes.languageNotes: Returns { tmpDir, memory } tuple

nodes.name: teardownMemory
nodes.summary: Helper function recursively removing a temp directory for cleanup
nodes.languageNotes: Calls fs.rmSync with recursive + force

nodes.name: makeTextPart
nodes.summary: Helper creating a text Part stub for token counting tests
nodes.languageNotes: Returns { type: 'text', text }

nodes.summary: Helper creating a flow control text Part stub (text with <protect> marker)
nodes.languageNotes: Returns { type: 'text', text } with <protect> content

nodes.languageNotes: Returns { type: 'tool', ...overrides }

nodes.summary: Helper creating a reasoning Part stub
nodes.languageNotes: Returns { type: 'reasoning', text }

nodes.languageNotes: Wraps parts into MessagePack with user role

nodes.name: makeAssistantMessage
nodes.summary: Helper creating an assistant-role MessagePack stub
nodes.languageNotes: Wraps parts into MessagePack with assistant role

nodes.name: expectedTokens
nodes.summary: Helper calculating expected token count matching the mock tiktoken encoder behavior (ceil(text.length/4), min 1, 0 for empty/whitespace)
nodes.languageNotes: Mirrors mock tiktoken encoding formula

nodes.name: createTestProject
nodes.summary: Helper creating temp project with docs/template, docs/flow, docs/regulation directories
nodes.languageNotes: Used in command-generation and template-scan tests

nodes.name: writeTemplateWithCommand
nodes.summary: Helper writing a template bundle with a Command metadata field and optional input requirements section
nodes.languageNotes: Creates flow.md with **Command**:, **Template ID**:, state machine, and task steps

nodes.name: writeTemplateWithoutCommand
nodes.summary: Helper writing a template bundle without a Command metadata field
nodes.languageNotes: Omits **Command**: line from flow.md

nodes.name: writeTemplateBundle
nodes.summary: Helper writing a complete template bundle with flow.md containing Template ID, Category, Description, Version, state machine, and task steps
nodes.languageNotes: Used by writeTemplateWithRegulations

nodes.name: writeTemplateWithRegulations
nodes.summary: Helper writing a template bundle with associated regulation files in a regulations subdirectory
nodes.languageNotes: Creates docs/template/{id}/regulations/ files

nodes.name: setupDcpProject
nodes.summary: Helper creating a project with .opencode/package.json containing opencode-dynamic-context-pruning dependency and a test template bundle
nodes.languageNotes: Used in nested DCP describe block

nodes.name: setupActiveTask
nodes.summary: Helper creating an active task via MemorySystem for integration tests
nodes.languageNotes: Uses CreateTaskInput with bug-fix flow

nodes.name: mockRGBA
nodes.summary: Mock RGBA color utility from @opentui/core providing fromInts, fromArray, fromValues factory methods
nodes.languageNotes: Global mock.module() replacement

nodes.name: TypeScript Coding Style
nodes.summary: TypeScript coding style guidelines covering naming conventions, type safety rules, file organization, async handling, logging, and export patterns.

nodes.name: Project Constitution
nodes.summary: Project constitution with 9 core principles: Flow+Spec+Test-Driven Development, type safety, verification mandatory, Mermaid diagrams, module independence, minimal change, SDK-first development, Chinese-first communication, and respect manual changes.

nodes.name: Flow Engine Spec
nodes.summary: Specification for the Flow Engine module handling command detection, automatic task creation, control prompt injection, fingerprint deduplication, and task lifecycle management. LLM-driven flow control without code-level FSM.

nodes.name: I18N Research Report
nodes.summary: Research report analyzing current I18N architecture gaps and proposing three extension paths: dictionary-only injection, programmatic dictionary with runtime switching, and dictionary + LLM translation generation.

nodes.name: Memory System Spec
nodes.summary: Specification for the Memory System data layer using SQLite (bun:sqlite) for persistent structured memory. Defines Task, Discussion, and FlowMetrics domain models with full CRUD interfaces and WAL mode concurrency.

nodes.name: Metrics Collection Spec
nodes.summary: Specification for metrics collection including tiktoken-based token counting with source classification (System/FlowControl/User/Assistant/Tool/Reasoning), Task.endAt and FlowMetrics.tokensBySource schema extensions, and new IMemorySystem query interfaces.

nodes.name: Overall Architecture Spec
nodes.summary: Overall architecture specification covering system layers (Plugin Core, Flow Engine, Memory System, Template Manager), core data flow, context injection approach, directory structure, and technology stack.

nodes.name: Plugin Core Spec
nodes.summary: Specification for the Plugin Core entry layer handling plugin initialization, command registration (config hook + tool hook), configuration loading from .vibe-pm.json, lifecycle hooks orchestration, and module composition.

nodes.name: Template Manager Spec
nodes.summary: Specification for the Template Manager module handling flow template scanning from docs/template/, installation to docs/flow/, uninstallation, and automatic Command file generation in .opencode/commands/. Convention-based path approach without interface abstraction layer.

nodes.name: TUI Extension Spec
nodes.summary: Specification for the TUI sidebar extension providing real-time task status (active/last/empty), Token distribution visualization with color-coded bar and source breakdown, and step-level analytics via SolidJS components rendered in OpenCode TUI sidebar_content slot.

nodes.name: Design Spec Flow Template
nodes.summary: Flow template for designing new feature specs from scratch. 6-step process: understand requirements, explore facts, mark gaps, progressive interview (human-in-loop), design structured Spec document, user review. Includes state machine with interview loop.

nodes.name: Flow Template Definition
nodes.summary: Base meta-template for creating new flow documents. Defines standard structure: applicable scenarios, input requirements table, default deliverables, Mermaid state machine diagram, and task steps with human-in-loop annotations. Reference for template format compliance.

nodes.name: Large Refactor Flow Template
nodes.summary: Flow template for large-scale code refactoring across multiple modules (5+ files). 13-step process: understand intent, explore code, assess impact+risk, progressive interview, design migration path with backward compatibility, plan review, implement with compatible layer, migration tests, test fix, compatibility verification, self-check, user acceptance, merge.

nodes.name: Research Flow Template
nodes.summary: Flow template for research and analysis tasks. 6-step process: understand input intent, explore known facts via explore/librarian agents, mark knowledge gaps, progressive interview (human-in-loop), execute research producing report/spec/plan, user review output.

nodes.name: Spec-Driven Dev Flow Template
nodes.summary: Flow template for spec-driven development of medium to large features. 10-step process: understand requirements from existing Spec, mark gaps, progressive interview, design unified Plan (Spec changes + code changes + Spec-code conflict analysis), plan review, implement, test, self-check with code review, user acceptance, delivery merge.

nodes.name: Project README
nodes.summary: Project-level README and OpenCode agent instructions. Documents tech stack (TypeScript, Bun, @opencode-ai/plugin SDK, SQLite, Zod, tiktoken), all /pm-* commands, core concepts (dual memory system, FSM-driven task model, step-aware context injection, metrics collection), design principles, and anti-patterns.

nodes.name: TUI Plugin Development Skill
nodes.summary: OpenCode TUI sidebar plugin development best practices guide covering SolidJS component patterns (avoid cross-component signal passing, inline rendering), layout strategies (string padding over flexbox), bun:sqlite data fetching, onMouseUp interaction, build configuration with Bun.build() and solidPlugin, and debugging techniques.

nodes.name: NPM Package Manifest
nodes.summary: NPM package manifest defining project name (vibe-pm), version 0.1.0, ESM module type, build/test/typecheck scripts, and dependencies including @opencode-ai/plugin ^1.17.4, @opentui/* ^0.3.4, solid-js, tiktoken, and zod.

nodes.name: Bun Configuration
nodes.summary: Bun runtime configuration specifying test preload script as ./tests/setup.ts.

nodes.name: TypeScript Configuration
nodes.summary: TypeScript compiler configuration targeting ES2022 with ESNext modules, Bundler module resolution, strict mode enabled, JSX preserve with @opentui/solid import source, source maps, and declaration output to dist/.

edges.description: FlowEngine's DuplicateActiveTaskError wraps MemorySystem's DuplicateTaskError with richer task context

layers.name: Plugin Core
layers.description: Plugin entry point, SDKa-typed hooks, config/commands/logging orchestration, and DCP integration. Orchestrates all subsystems via direct imports — no DI container.

layers.name: Flow Engine
layers.description: FSM-driven task lifecycle: startTask, setStep, closeTask. Three-layer sandwich context injection, message pruning pipeline, LLM-driven step transitions with HiL support.

layers.name: Memory Layer
layers.description: SQLite (bun:sqlite) persistence layer with 4 tables (tasks, discussions, flowMetrics, session_tokens), prepared statements, WAL mode, CRUD for all entities, step transition tracking, token recording with source breakdown, dwell time accumulation.

layers.name: Template Management
layers.description: Pure file-operation module: scans docs/template/ for bundles, installs flows with regulations/constitution/dictionary/coding-style, uninstalls flows, detects project languages, generates coding style guides. Convention-based path approach with no abstraction layer.

layers.name: Token / Metrics
layers.description: tiktoken-based token counting with source classification (6 categories — User, Assistant, FlowControl, Text, Tool, Reasoning), per-message TokenCount structures, per-step metrics collection, bottleneck detection, and auto-generated Discussion items.

layers.name: TUI Extension
layers.description: SolidJS-based terminal UI sidebar for OpenCode TUI. Renders active task status (flow/step/elapsed), color-coded token distribution bar chart, step-level breakdown via sidebar_content slot with 1s polling.

layers.name: Documentation
layers.description: Architecture specs (docs/spec/), regulations/constitution (docs/regulation/), flow definitions (docs/flow/), template bundles (docs/template/), project-level AGENTS.md, OpenCode skill definitions, and rules templates.

layers.name: Configuration
layers.description: Project-level config files: package.json, tsconfig.json, bunfig.toml, vitest.config.ts, .gitignore, pnpm-lock.yaml, understand-anything tooling config, and build scripts (scripts/build-tui.ts).

layers.name: Testing
layers.description: bun:test test suite mirroring src/ directory structure: core/, engine/, memory/, template/, token/, tui/. Includes setup mocks for @opentui/core and @opentui/solid dependencies.
